item.title: Pay attention!
item.description: Don't let em fool you. Check the price per unit weight or volume if your state mandates they show that on the price tag (like NY or IL) and make sure you're not being screwed. Boycott the ones that try.

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends. i did not add those pointless red markings
wouldn't be something i would order but looks well prepared?
right.. moving on
he must be a bodybuilder
they better be looking at plants/trees
mayo is good but only in small amounts
(his gf)
someone made a big creme pie
yes
i guess he gets tired of being able to fly everywhere
i am so tired of child guessing
OC meme here
sometimes but mostly i'm good!
man that guy is really small
if you feel like it.. comment away!
we've all been there
i've been doing it all wrong
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Meme Dump 32 out of 200
item.description:
Hii imgur ♡ Happy Sunday. Get your tears ready to cry on corporate time tomorrow
It's true lmao tell me your childhood traumas and if you're in therapy
It's me, always
I like to believe I'm a capybara on a good day
Hi, please call me egg ♡
This meme is from like 2018 idk if gender reveals like this are still a thing
Grow little baby grow
Hope you guys had a good weekend and ate good food Stay hydrated beauties ♡ #memes #memedump #funny #meme_dump #mentalhealth #moms_spaghetti

item.dc:creator: TheSwedishChemist

item.title: They could have just paid me. Now they are going to pay us all.
item.description:
My job has a midrange pay increase for employees that are in 1 position for 18 months with at least a 3 at the most recent review. I've been sticking with this job for that raise, which is a 3 dollar an hour increase for me. I warned my DM months ago I would be applying for it so she would be prepared to submit the paperwork and when it came time to do it she turned around and said I didn't qualify because I needed a 3.7 review which is basically impossible in my company.
It took over a month to get this sorted. Going back and forth between my DM store manager and HR. I did not let up. What made me the most angry was if my DM didn't know where to find the criteria for the raise, then how did she know I didn't qualify? So I kept at it and I got my raise as well as back pay and the written document which I then sent to every store In my district. Who knows how many people have missed out on this raise because they don't even know it exists. I'm going to make sure everyone in my district gets this raise. I'll probably get fired for this, but I don't care anymore. Most viral update: thank you guys for your support. Imgur has gotten me through a lot of hard times and I was really excited to share this win with you guys. There's a lot of us out there working for big corporations that claim advancement and benefits to the public but they don't share them with their employees. Get on reddit get on every forum you can about your company read and ask questions about pay and benefits. Fight back. Remember the bugs life moment You let one ant stand up to us and they all might stand up. Those puny little ants outnumber us a hundred to one, and if they ever figure that out there goes our way of life!! It's not about food! It's about keeping those ants in Be that one weird ant.
item.dc:creator: Monsoonaluna

Like what we do and how do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. Totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: My Mario day post is in another castle
item.dc:creator: DrunkKingOfImgur

item.title: Extremely bittersweet.
item.description: This was an absolute dream costume for me. I had been a member of the 501st Legion and Mandalorian Mercs for a few years when I got the opportunity to purchase the entire thing from someone relatively local who was my size and build. I got to wear it onsttage for a John Williams symphony event, at conventions, for pet adoption... Then a medical issue left me disabled. I haven't been physically capable of wearing the suit since 2021, with little hope of improvement. I haven't been able to work, I'm still waiting on a disability ruling, and now we have to move...possibly twice. I need the space, I need the money. The same day I put it up for sale to my local Star Wars groups, it sold. I got my asking price for the entire thing (barely below what I paid). They came and picked it up. It's staying local. I could not have asked for a quicker, smoother, easier sale into better circumstances. It will see use again instead of gathering dust. But it really hurt to let it go. To admit that I might never be capable of costuming on this level again. It makes me feel broken.
item.dc:creator: DodgingTreesAndBlastingRebels

item.title: 8th Cake Day
item.description: Today apparently is my 8th cake day. This is the first thing I think when someone mentions the word "cake". The cake is a lie. source: https://www.deviantart.com/carassiusvigorous/art/the-cake-is-not-a-lie-597325534
item.dc:creator: Martini991

item.title: It was a sincere conpliment
item.description: I meant to say " sup fellow nerd " but I was over excited and well, it came out wrong. He didn't seem bothered and we had a great conversation. i brought my Tom Servo and he said it was really accurate and said he actually worked with the guys at mst3k. He also signed it. I might have fan girled too much but it's a memory il always enjoy. I met a lot of people and had a ton of people stop me and ask about the puppet and wanted to take pictures of it. I made a joke that Tom was getting all the attention lol. As a socially awkward person think I got through it really well but it was a bit overwhelming. I would have got more pictures but I'm trying to avoid my phone for things like this and just live in the moment.
item.dc:creator: Stressicca

item.dc:creator: Beardedgeek72

item.title: Dragon greed
item.description:
This is an account on the avarice of Middle-earth's dragons. Today is the five year anniversary of my first Tolkien lore post on imgur, so wish to say it has been my honour to share this journey (art by JRR Tolkien).
The dreadful beasts were created in the First Age by Morgoth, the original Dark Lord, and the "lust and greed and cunning evil of these is the greatest of all creatures" (The History of Middle-Earth 2; II). Greedy dragons was a theme in historical western legends. For example in Beowulf, that was important to Tolkien, a dragon raged after a thief stole a jewelled cup from its hoard (art by John Howe).
First Morgoth brought forth "Glaurung father of dragons" (The Silmarillion; III; XX). Glaurung at a time led an army to capture the Elven underground stronghold of Nargothrond. After the victory the "Orcs that were busy in the sack he routed forth, and drove them away, and denied them their plunder even to the last thing of worth.... he gathered all the hoard and riches... and heaped them, and lay upon them in the innermost hall..." (Silmarillion; III; XXI, art by Helge C. Balzer).
At the end of the First Age were most Great Worms slain when Morgoth was defeated, but by the Third Age had they grown in number again in the far North. They came into conflict with Northmen but the rich Dwarves were their main targets; from about year 2000 of the Third Age "they made war on the Dwarves, and plundered their works" (The Return of the King; Appendix A; III, art by sandara).
After 2590 many Dwarves settled at Erebor, the Lonely Mountain, that grew remarkably wealthy. In time "the rumour of the wealth of Erebor spread abroad and reached the ears of the dragons" (ibid). At last Smaug, greatest of the dragons of his day, attacked. Smaug captured Erebor in 2770, and like Glaurung long before in Nargothrond he made Erebor his new lair.
From that we learn about the greed of the Great Worms and their hoards: "Dragons steal gold and jewels, you know, from men and elves and dwarves, wherever they can find them; and they guard their plunder as long as they live... and never enjoy a brass ring of it." – The Hobbit; I (art by Stephen Hickman)
"Indeed they hardly know a good bit of work from a bad, though they usually have a good notion of the current market value; and they can’t make a thing for themselves, not even mend a little loose scale of their armour." –ibid The hobbit Bilbo Baggins came to Erebor in 2941 with Dwarves led by King Thorin. With the aid of his invisibility ring Bilbo took a golden cup and got away but Smaug soon reacted (art by Justin Gerard);
"He stirred and stretched forth his neck to sniff. Then he missed the cup! Thieves! Fire! Murder! Such a thing had not happened since first he came to the Mountain! His rage passes description - the sort of rage that is only seen when rich folk that have more than they can enjoy suddenly lose something that they have long had but have never before used or wanted. His fire belched forth, the hall smoked, he shook the mountain-roots." – TH; XII (art by the Brothers Hildebrandt)
Their greed could seemingly spread to others - though it is possible that 'dragon-sickness' is a synonym for avarice, ie that people acts as if infected by dragons [greed is often compared to a disease]. There are two entries on the matter. The first tells how Bilbo "did not reckon with the power that gold has upon which a dragon has long brooded, nor with dwarvish hearts. Long hours in the past days Thorin had spent in the treasury, and the lust of it was heavy on him" (TH; XV). Later Lake-town's Mayor was given "much gold for the help of the Lake-people, but being of the kind that easily catches such disease he fell under the dragon-sickness, and took most of the gold and fled with it, and died of starvation in the Waste, deserted by his companions" (TH; XIX, art by Rodney Matthews).
As for our own time, some hoard beyond sense and wear greed as a badge of honour, and I recall a line by author Neil Gaiman: "Fiction is a lie that tells us true things, over and over." Here be dragons... — — — — — In case you enjoyed this and would like to read further Tolkien lore posts about characters, themes, objects and events, here are two indexes: Character bios https://imgur.com/gallery/axV2mPF Folks, animals, items, etc https://imgur.com/gallery/AQK9pJL
item.dc:creator: Ngugi
